business_ideas.idea: Privacy services and monitoring platforms for executives
AI Tinder with fake digital matches and gamification
TikTok shop affiliate products focusing on high-conversion items
Water taxi services for popular lake destinations

predictions.text: Gen Z will prioritize privacy and personal data protection increasingly
TikTok shop distribution will be acquired by Uber by 2028

dynamics: Three hosts award different categories to notable entrepreneurs and investments. Sam drives much of discussion; Shaan and Andrew add shorter commentary. Special tribute to Charlie Munger who recently passed. Format is year-end reflection and celebration.
frameworks: Three stages of product market: Clueless → Curious → Saturation
Make space for greatness - eliminate 'okay' opportunities to allow better ones
Focus and seriousness beats raw talent spread thin
FU money versus FU loyalty, FU happiness, and other wealth paradoxes
learnings: Deep focus and unwavering commitment often beats raw talent and intelligence
Loyalty to partners is extremely valuable and sustainable for long-term success
Creating intentional space by eliminating mediocre opportunities allows breakthrough ideas to land
Timing windows for opportunities are narrow (early TikTok shops, early Facebook ads)
Success requires patience and willingness to pursue unsexy industries

banger_quotes.quote: Keep the money warm, you know, thank you for keeping the money warm for me
If you want something great you gotta make space for great
TikTok shops is currently very cheap and not saturated

numbers_dropped: Shadow work journal: 500K+ copies sold in 2.5-3 months via TikTok shop
Charlie Munger built $1B real estate portfolio as side hustle starting at age 90
Rolling fund had ~50 investors requiring management
Silver Lake owns $500M stake in Manchester City
Kevin Ryan effective tax rate: 14%, children get 0% on capital gains via QSBS
notable: Part 1 of 2-part Millie Awards year-end special; Charlie Munger tribute; focus on quality over quantity in business pursuits
